title: hedyotis thwaitesii
intro: Hedyotis thwaitesii, also known as Thwaites' buttonweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hedyotis thwaitesii are said to include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting digestion, and supporting immune function. Hedyotis thwaitesii can be prepared as a herbal tea or used as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
